title: Myoflex
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Myoflex''' was a modified sheet of plastic that was produced in the first years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The plastic was best known for its use in heat dispersion. The inventor [[Hogar]] used myoflex to cover the main temperature sensor on the [[HR-211 Powersuit|HR-211]] [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]], fooling the cooling unit into thinking it was hotter than it actually was and causing it to run more. This brought down the internal temperature of the suit, making it more comfortable to wear for long periods.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-09-XX -->''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''
